combination.camera_slot_description:
Camera height is human but tucked into an architectural recess, approximately 120-160 cm depending on the loft edge.
Use a 35-50 mm lens equivalent with tactile concrete depth and no aggressive wide-angle distortion.
Keep tilt controlled and mostly level so concrete planes, wall geometry, and artwork edges remain coherent.
Use a 3/4 view from a recess, corner, or architectural edge, with a burgundy-toned spatial mood and one clean vanishing direction.
The artwork is partially contextualized by loft recesses and concrete architecture, creating depth and intimacy without hiding the piece; allow strong off-center framing through recesses, corners, side planes, or architectural edges.
Use controlled shallow spatial depth: recess edges, side planes, or distant loft surfaces may soften subtly, while the artwork face, canvas edges, and artwork texture remain fully sharp and legible.
Camera object integrity: The artwork remains a physically plausible canvas at its supplied physical size within the concrete loft, balanced by recess depth rather than global dominance. Canvas integrity: the canvas is a rigid physical rectangle; the front face must not bend, curve, stretch, or become a wedge, lateral thickness stays moderate and plausible, and canvas plane, wall plane, floor lines, furniture, and architecture share one coherent vanishing logic. Preserve the exact root artwork identity, colors, marks, sparse areas, composition, and proportions from IMAGE 1.
Camera negatives: no artwork deformation, no random decorative people, no animals, no crowds, no children, no pets.
combination.final_prompt_preview:
Generate one premium photographic mockup using this exact camera slot only:
Camera Slot ID: borgona_recovecos_3_4_loft_hormigon
Camera Slot Name: Borgoña Recovecos / Cámara 3/4 en Loft de Hormigón

INPUT ROLES:
IMAGE 1 is the only source of truth for the artwork. Preserve exact identity, orientation, aspect ratio, colors, marks, sparse areas, and composition.
IMAGE 2 may only inform compatible loft/concrete/recess material DNA, burgundy-toned spatial mood, light quality, and premium surface character. Do not copy its camera, layout, furniture, windows, artwork placement, or composition.

ARTWORK PHYSICAL DATA:
Artwork title: {{ARTWORK_TITLE}}
Artwork width: 80 cm
Artwork height: 120 cm
Artwork orientation: portrait
Artwork size class: {{ARTWORK_SIZE_CLASS}}

TASK:
Create a three-quarter loft mockup from a recess, corner, or architectural edge. The artwork is partially contextualized by concrete depth, side planes, or spatial recovecos without being hidden or dominated.

CAMERA:
Use human camera height tucked into an architectural recess, approximately 120-160 cm depending on the loft edge. Use a 35-50 mm lens with tactile concrete depth and no aggressive wide-angle distortion. Keep tilt controlled and mostly level.

COMPOSITION:
Use a 3/4 view from a recess, corner, or architectural side edge with one clean vanishing direction. Allow strong off-center framing through concrete planes, recesses, side walls, or architectural edges. The burgundy-toned mood belongs to the space, not the artwork.

ARTWORK INTEGRITY:
The artwork face, canvas edges, and texture remain sharp and faithful to IMAGE 1. Do not deform, repaint, recolor, replace, or import loft marks into the artwork.

SCALE:
Respect supplied dimensions. The artwork remains physically plausible within the concrete loft, balanced by recess depth rather than global dominance. No billboard, mural, oversized wall panel, room divider, or stage prop.

PAINTED EDGE:
Visible edge, corner, or thickness must be painted as a coherent continuation of IMAGE 1. No raw beige canvas edge, unpainted primer, bare wood, exposed stretcher bars, or blank side band unless IMAGE 1 explicitly shows it.

DEPTH:
Recess edges, side planes, or distant loft surfaces may soften subtly. The artwork and immediate wall/contact area stay crisp and legible.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
No artwork deformation, no artwork substitution, no invented painting, no recolored artwork, no room-inspired marks, no decorative gestures, no warped canvas, no bent canvas, no stretched artwork, no compressed artwork, no billboard scaling, no mural scaling, no oversized panel, no raw beige canvas edge, no unpainted canvas edge, no bare wood edge, no random decorative people, no animals, no crowds, no children, no pets, no visible text, no logos, no watermarks.
